div.head: 38. Editorial Note
div.p: On February 11, Radford sent a memorandum from the Joint Chiefs of Staff to the Secretary of Defense recommending concepts and broad outline plans for the use of United States military power under the Manila Pact in the event of Communist aggression in Southeast Asia. For the text, see United States–Vietnam Relations, 1945–1967, Book 10, pages 885–887.
